data.title: OKX launches exclusive WalletConnect airdrop event, participants can share 6,500,000 WCT tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, to celebrate the official launch of WalletConnect on OKX, an exclusive airdrop event jointly initiated by WalletConnect and OKX has been launched, and a total of 6,500,000 WCT tokens will be issued.
Users can participate in this airdrop event in the following ways: visit the event page, connect to the OKX Web3 wallet, deposit WCT tokens in the wallet, and fill in the OKX UID and OKX Optimism recharge wallet address to obtain airdrop qualifications.
WalletConnect is an open source protocol that aims to connect users to decentralized applications (dApps) in a secure and interoperable way, promote user experience innovation, expand the ecosystem, and guide the network towards a decentralized, permissionless future.

data.title: BitMart will list Babylon(BABY)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart will launch Babylon (BABY) at 18:00 (Eastern Time) on April 10, and the BABY/USDT trading pair will be launched.
The Babylon Bitcoin Staking Protocol connects the Bitcoin Security Network with Bitcoin holders, giving you direct access to the largest and most powerful community in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: Ledger now supports self-custody of SUI and ecological tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ledger announced that it now supports users to seamlessly realize self-custody of SUI and Sui ecological tokens. Through Ledger, users can enjoy Clear Signing, more convenient access to the Sui ecosystem, enhanced functional support and top-level self-management experience. Officials said that Ledger will work closely with Sui to continuously expand functions and help users safely and conveniently participate in Sui's growing DeFi ecosystem.

data.title: Revolut Faces €3.5 Million Fine in Lithuania Over Money Laundering Controls
data.description:
According to PANews, Revolut, a bank known for its crypto-friendly approach, has been fined €3.5 million in Lithuania due to failures in its money laundering controls. The Lithuanian regulatory authorities imposed the maximum penalty on Revolut, citing 'violations and deficiencies' in the company's processes.

Revolut has previously announced plans for an IPO in the United States, with an estimated valuation of $45 billion. The bank continues to expand its operations in the digital asset sector, having launched its crypto-focused trading platform, Revolut X, earlier this year in the United Kingdom. The platform has since been rolled out to 30 European markets.

data.title: OKX will launch BABY perpetual contracts and leveraged trading
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will launch BABYUSDT perpetual contract at 7:00 pm (UTC+8) on April 10, 2025, and open BABY leveraged trading and simple coin earning services at 12:00 noon (UTC+8) on April 11. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 580 USDT with a 5.14% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 10, 2025, 06:11 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 580 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 580.049988 USDT, with a narrowed 5.14% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitget will list Mind Network (FHE)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget will launch Mind Network (FHE) in the Innovation Zone, Web3 and AI Zone at 22:00 (UTC+8) on April 10.

data.title: UXLINK Joins Stanford University’s Future Digital Currency Initiative (FDCI)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, UXLINK announced that it has joined the Stanford University Future Digital Currency Initiative (FDCI) and become an official member of Stanford FDCI.

UXLINK, as one of the world's largest social infrastructure and platforms, has been committed to promoting the large-scale adoption of Web3 and promoting the overall growth of the industry. Stanford University, as the world's top research institution and the cradle of countless entrepreneurs, its "Future of Digital Currency Initiative" (FDCI) under the Department of Computer Science focuses on exploring the emerging role of digital currency in enhancing global financial inclusion. This vision is highly consistent with UXLINK's mission.

The strategic cooperation with Stanford FDCI reflects UXLINK's firm commitment to continue to invest in research and development and directly address these challenges. Through this cooperation, UXLINK will work together to promote innovation and help achieve the ambitious goal of global financial inclusion.

data.title: Binance Simple Earn adds RIF staking product
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance SimpleEarn will add the Rootstock Infrastructure Framework (RIF) lock-up product from 10:00 (UTC) on April 10, 2025 to 09:59 (UTC) on October 10, 2025. Users can subscribe to 30-day, 60-day or 120-day products and receive an annualized rate of return of 3%, 5.5% and 9.9% respectively. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
